[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101011101 6
1 100101101 5
2 000000011 2
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 001011100 4
